verification_performed: Confirmed changes stayed within the four allowed writable rules/docs files plus the required new doctrine file

Confirmed the new doctrine file encodes two-track classification, startup proof, runtime-before-trust, evidence framework, read-only-before-patching, loss containment priority, replay-first learning, strict review language, manager discipline, and worker discipline
Confirmed the existing manager/worker/review files now reference the shared doctrine instead of duplicating the full policy

doctrine_changes: Added BOT_BRIDGE_OPERATING_PRINCIPLES.md as the top-level operating doctrine
Encoded Track A vs Track B separation and priority rules
Added startup proof and runtime-verification-before-trust doctrine
Added evidence framework: observed / proven / likely / ruled out / next step
Added replay-first learning rule for new strategy ideas
Tightened review language requirements around source-only vs runtime proof and unproven items
Tightened manager discipline against stale assumptions and false confidence from board cleanliness
Tightened worker discipline against widening from runtime truth into strategy work
conflicting_old_rules_found: No hard contradictions found, but the prior rules under-emphasized runtime proof versus source-only completion and did not explicitly separate plumbing/runtime tasks from alpha/strategy tasks.
